loader.label: Items Protect
hero.title: Your pieces deserve protection worthy of their value
hero.desc: High-end acrylic cases designed by and for TCG and collectibles enthusiasts. Pokémon, Yu-Gi-Oh!, Magic, figurines : every precious piece has its ideal protection.
story.title: Born from passion, built with precision
story.p1: Items Protect was born from a simple observation: TCG and rare-item collectors invest hundreds, even thousands of euros in their pieces, and then leave them without protection worthy of the name.
story.p2.rest: Every case we offer has been tested by active collectors, in real conditions : conventions, long-term storage, transport.
story.p3.rest: . No compromises. No questionable materials. Protections you'll be proud to display.
story.value1.title: Protection, first and foremost
story.value1.desc: High-density acrylic, resistant to shocks, dust and humidity. Your pieces stay as perfect as day one.
story.value2.title: Aesthetics designed to display
story.value2.desc: A beautiful case showcases what's inside. Perfect transparency, polished edges, clean and modern design.
story.value3.title: A community, not customers
story.value3.desc: We answer because we're just like you. We understand the value of a rare piece, the passion behind a collection.
story.badge1.title: Grade A acrylic
story.badge2.title: Magnetic closure
why.title: Everything a real acrylic protection should offer
why.lead: No compromise on quality. No cheap plastic. No anonymous customer.
why.01.title: High-quality acrylic
why.01.desc: Maximum optical transparency, UV, shock and humidity resistance. Your pieces will remain flawless for years.
why.02.title: Secure closure
why.02.desc: Integrated magnets on premium models. Airtight closure, intuitive opening. Zero risk of falling or slipping.
why.03.title: Built for transport
why.03.desc: Conventions, exhibitions, travel. Our cases are robust both on the go and on display. Designed to travel.
why.04.title: Exhibition design
why.04.desc: Mirror-polished edges, clean angles, refined proportions. The case stays discreet to better showcase its contents.
why.05.title: Solutions for individuals & pros
why.05.desc: Whether you're a solo collector or a TCG shop owner, we have pricing and volumes tailored to your needs.
why.06.title: Enthusiast support
why.06.desc: We respond quickly, we understand your needs without needing everything explained. Because we're exactly like you.
products.title: Every collection has its ideal protection
products.lead: Exact dimensions, carefully selected materials and finishes that make a difference at first glance.
products.slim.name:
Slim Acrylic Case
Standard Booster
products.slim.desc: The reference for protecting your Pokémon, Yu-Gi-Oh! and Magic boosters. Millimetre-precise, it perfectly fits the booster while putting it on display.
products.etb.name: Pokémon ETB Display Case
products.etb.desc: Custom-built for the Pokémon Elite Trainer Box. Internal support included, UV front panel, tool-free assembly.
products.custom.name: Custom Order
products.custom.desc: Non-standard dimensions, quantity, engraved logo, custom backing, for shops, creators and event organisers.
products.opcs.name: One Piece CS Collector Case
products.opcs.desc: Official One Piece Treasure Cup dimensions. Quick assembly, reinforced corners, secure snap closure.
products.bbox.name: Pokémon Booster Box Case
products.bbox.desc: XXL protection for your complete Pokémon Booster Box. Large format, reinforced magnetic closure, thick 3mm acrylic.
products.dbox.name: Slim Deck Box Protection
products.dbox.desc: Ideal for displaying and protecting your complete 60-card deck. Slim profile, discreet magnetic closure, polished edges.
products.figm.name: Figurine Display Case M
products.figm.desc: Amiibo, Nendoroid, articulated figurines size M. Black or mirror backing of your choice. Assembly in 2 minutes, no tools.
products.figxl.name: Tall Figurine Display XL
products.figxl.desc: Maximum height for your statuettes and large figurines. Integrated mirror backing, custom cut available, glue-free assembly.
products.disp.name: 36-Booster Display Protection
products.disp.desc: Display-sized case for 36 boosters. UV-resistant, customisable, optional engraved logo on request. Compatible with Pokémon and Yu-Gi-Oh!
products.tin.name: Premium Tin Case
products.tin.desc: Custom-fit protection for Pokémon and Yu-Gi-Oh! Tins. Scratch-resistant acrylic, optimal display. Universal fit for all Tins.
products.pack.name: Shop Pack × 10
products.pack.desc: Pack of 10 identical cases for TCG shops. Full customisation, preferential pricing, negotiable express delivery.
products.laser.name: Custom Laser Engraving
products.laser.desc: Your design, logo or text laser-engraved on your acrylic case. Half-millimetre precision, premium finish. Unique and professional result.
universes.title: Your universe has its case
universes.lead: Pokémon, Yu-Gi-Oh!, Magic, One Piece and many more. All formats covered, every passion served.

process.title: Simple, no friction
process.lead: No mandatory account, no complicated steps. Just your piece, protected.
process.step1.title: Choose your model
process.step1.desc: Browse the catalogue and find the case suited to your format. If you're unsure, our team will guide you.
process.step2.title: Contact us
process.step2.desc: Send us a message by email, Instagram or Discord. We confirm availability, options and pricing together.
process.step3.title: We prepare your order
process.step3.desc: Every case is checked before shipping. Careful packaging, full protection during transport.
process.step4.title: Receive & display
process.step4.desc: Delivery in 2 to 4 working days. Your pieces finally get the protection they deserve.
testi.title: The community speaks for us
testi.lead: Hundreds of collectors trust us. Here's what they think.
testi.1.text: The quality exceeds my expectations. My Pikachu Illustrated Temporal Forces is perfectly displayed, zero unwanted reflections, absolute transparency. I'm now ordering for my entire collection.
testi.1.name: @PokéCollect_FR
testi.2.text: I ordered 50 cases for my shop. Impeccable delivery, professional quality, and a human follow-up, not a bot. We'll definitely continue long-term.
testi.2.name: La Caverne du Dragon
testi.3.text: Custom-made for my first edition Temporal Forces ETB, millimetre dimensions, assembly in 2 minutes. My piece is finally at its level. Customer service is just great.
testi.3.name: @TCG_Maxime
manifesto.quote:
Every piece you protect has a story.
A first pack opened, a rare card finally found,
an irreplaceable memory.
Our work is to ensure
it lasts as long as your passion.
cta.title: Your next rare piece deserves real protection
cta.desc: Contact us by message, email or social media. We reply quickly, we understand your needs, and we find the perfect protection together.
footer.desc: Premium acrylic protection for passionate collectors. TCG, figurines, sealed products and rare items, since 2022.

cb.header.name: Items Protect Assistant
cb.fallback: I didn't quite catch your request. Select a topic below or contact us directly.
flow.start.bot1:
Hello, welcome to Items Protect.

I'm here to help you find the right acrylic protection for your collection. Where shall we start?
flow.tcg_game.bot1: TCG is what we know best — every format, every game.
flow.tcg_poke.bot1: Pokémon, our favourite! ⚡ What exactly do you want to protect?
flow.tcg_ygo.bot1:
Yu-Gi-Oh! with those iconic artworks — definitely deserves proper protection. 🐉
Which format?
flow.tcg_magic.bot1:
Magic: The Gathering, a classic that only gains in value. 🪄
What product?
flow.tcg_op.bot1:
One Piece TCG! The Treasure Cup Set is one of our best-sellers. 🏴‍☠️
Which format?
flow.tcg_other.bot1: We also cover Dragon Ball Super, Lorcana, Naruto, Digimon, Flesh and Blood and much more!
flow.tcg_other.bot2: Most standard boosters fit in our Universal Slim Box. What's your format?
flow.fig_type.bot1: A beautiful figure deserves to be shown off, not hidden away. 🏺
flow.fig_amiibo.bot1: Amiibo fit perfectly in our Display Stand Format M.
flow.fig_amiibo.bot2: Choose between matte black or mirror finish to highlight every detail.
flow.fig_nend.bot1: Nendoroids have unique proportions, but our Format M works great for most of them.
flow.fig_nend.bot2: If yours is still in its original box or comes with accessories, our custom Format L will be a much better fit.
flow.fig_articu.bot1: Quick question to find the right size: approximately how tall is your figure?
flow.fig_large.bot1: For larger pieces, we go fully custom: cut to your exact millimetre measurements, with or without a base.
flow.fig_large.bot2: Send us the dimensions (W × D × H in mm) and we'll provide a free quote within 24 hours. No commitment.
flow.fig_contact.bot1: No problem at all, that's what we're here for. Just send us a photo or the dimensions of your figure.
flow.fig_contact.bot2: Our team will guide you to the perfect size, free of charge and no strings attached.
flow.sealed.bot1: A sealed product is often a real investment. We take that very seriously. 📦
flow.sealed.bot2: What type of product are you looking to protect?
flow.custom_intro.bot1: Custom orders are where we truly shine. ✨
flow.custom_intro.bot2: We work with TCG stores, content creators, tournament organisers and passionate collectors.
flow.custom_intro.bot3: Tell me, what type of project is this for?
flow.custom_logo.bot1: Laser engraving of your logo: extremely precise, premium finish. Available from 5 units.
flow.custom_logo.bot2: Vector file required (SVG / AI / PDF). Volume discounts from 10 units. Quote within 24h.
flow.custom_dims.bot1: Nothing in the catalogue fits? No problem — that's exactly what custom is for.
flow.custom_dims.bot2: Send us your dimensions (W × D × H in mm) and we'll handle the rest. No commitment.
flow.custom_pro.bot1: Our professional pricing starts from 3 units, with tiered discounts (10, 25, 50, 100+).
flow.custom_pro.bot2: We supply TCG stores, resellers and event organisers across France and the EU.
flow.custom_pro.info:
Average lead time: 7–14 working days
Shipping: France + EU
Pro payment: bank transfer, card, invoice
flow.custom_fond.bot1: Matte black, gloss white, mirror effect or custom colour — we handle it all.
flow.custom_fond.bot2: Some options (custom colour, gradient) require a minimum of 5 units.
flow.custom_autre.bot1: We love original projects. Describe your idea freely and we'll find a solution together. Nothing is really impossible.
flow.info_gen.bot1: Of course! What would you like to know?
flow.info_pricing.info:
📦 Slim Booster Case : from €8.90
🎴 Pokémon ETB Display : €24.90
📦 Display Protection : €34.90
🏴 One Piece CS Box : €29.00
🏺 Figurine Stand M : €18.50
✨ Custom : on quote (from 3 units)
flow.info_delivery.bot1: Here's everything you need to know about delivery:
flow.info_delivery.info:
🚚 Standard delivery: 2–4 working days
📍 Areas: Metropolitan France + EU
📬 Carriers: Colissimo / Mondial Relay
🔒 Packaging: Full protection, zero breakage risk
📦 Tracking: Tracking number provided
flow.info_quality.bot1: Material quality is our core commitment. Here are the details:
flow.info_quality.info:
🔬 Acrylic: Grade A, 3mm high-density
✨ Transparency: Maximum optical (99%+)
🛡️ Protection: Anti-UV, shock resistant
🧲 Closure: Integrated magnetic (premium models)
🪞 Finish: Mirror-polished edges, zero scratch
flow.info_order.bot1: Ordering from Items Protect is simple — 4 easy steps:
flow.info_order.info:
1️⃣ Choose your model from the catalogue
2️⃣ Contact us (email, Instagram or Discord)
3️⃣ Confirm your order and pay online
4️⃣ Receive your order within 2–4 days
flow.info_sav.bot1: Our after-sales service is handled directly by our team — real people, as passionate as you.
flow.info_sav.info:
📧 Email: contact@itemsprotect.fr
💬 Discord: Items Protect Server
⏱️ Response time: Within 24h (often less)
🔄 Exchanges: Yes, if defect found on delivery
✅ Satisfaction: Guaranteed. We always find a solution
flow.info_custom.info:
✨ Laser engraving: photo-realistic, durable
📐 Dimensions: Any size possible
🎨 Backings: Black, white, mirror, colour
📦 Quantity: From 3 units
💶 Pricing: Tiered volume discounts
flow.contact_conseil.bot1: No worries! Just send us the product name or a photo and we'll recommend the perfect size, for free and within 24h.
flow.rec_slim.bot1: Our Slim Acrylic Box is made exactly for this. Our number-one best-seller, and for good reason.
flow.rec_slim.prod.name: Slim Acrylic Case · Standard Booster
flow.rec_etb.bot1: The Pokémon ETB Display Case is precision-cut for the Elite Trainer Box. Internal stand included, assembled in 2 minutes, no tools needed.
flow.rec_etb.prod.name: Pokémon ETB Display Case
flow.rec_display.bot1: Our Display Protector is precisely sized for 36-booster displays from Pokémon and Yu-Gi-Oh!.
flow.rec_display.prod.name: Pokémon / YGO Display Protection
flow.rec_op.bot1: Our One Piece CS Collector Box matches the exact official dimensions of the Treasure Cup Set.
flow.rec_op.prod.name: One Piece CS Collector Box
flow.rec_card.bot1: For a rare or graded card, two options depending on its value.
flow.rec_card.bot2: For high-value graded cards (PSA/BGS), we recommend a custom box with foam insert for a perfect hold.
flow.rec_commander.bot1: For a Magic Commander Deck (elongated box), our Slim Box adapts well to the standard format.
flow.rec_commander.bot2: If it's in a separate collector box, a custom solution will be more appropriate.
flow.rec_coffret.bot1: Collector boxes almost always have unique dimensions. A custom box guarantees a perfect fit.
flow.rec_coffret.bot2: Send us the dimensions (W × D × H in mm) and we'll come back to you within 24h with a full quote.
flow.rec_bbox.bot1: A full booster box deserves serious protection! 💪
flow.rec_bbox.bot2: For this format, we go full custom: corner reinforcements, magnetic closure, exact dimensions.
flow.rec_fig_m.bot1: Our Display Stand Format M is perfectly suited to this type of figure.
flow.rec_fig_m.prod.name: Figurine Display Stand · Format M
flow.rec_fig_l.bot1: For this format, the Display Stand Format L is what you need. Available on order.
flow.rec_fig_l.bot2: Designed for figures between 12 and 25 cm, base included, mirror-polished edges.
flow.rec_custom_d.bot1: An off-catalogue format? That's exactly where we excel.
flow.rec_custom_d.bot2: Send us your exact dimensions (W × D × H in mm) and we'll prepare a free quote with no commitment.
flow.rec_custom_fig.bot1: For a figure with its original box or accessories, a custom solution guarantees a perfect fit with no wasted space.
flow.redirect_contact.bot1: I'm sending you to our contact form. Describe your needs and we'll get back to you quickly.
flow.redirect_products.bot1: Here's a link to our full catalogue.

faq.title: We have the answers
faq.lead: Everything you need to know before ordering.
faq.q1: Do standard boosters fit in the Slim Case?
faq.a1: Yes! The Slim Case is millimetre-precise for all standard formats: Pokémon, Yu-Gi-Oh!, Magic… If you're unsure, contact us and we'll check together.
faq.q2: How do I place an order?
faq.a2: Contact us by email, Instagram or Discord. We handle each order manually to guarantee the best service. No automated online shop, we prefer a human touch.
faq.a3: 2 to 4 working days for metropolitan France. Delivery available across the EU via Colissimo or Mondial Relay. A tracking number is sent once your order ships.
faq.q4: Do you offer discounts for shops and professionals?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Volume pricing from 3 units, with tiers at 10, 25, 50 and 100+. Contact us for a personalised quote tailored to your volume.
faq.a5: No. We exclusively use Grade A anti-UV treated acrylic, which maintains its optical transparency long-term, unlike cheap plastic alternatives.
faq.q6: Do you make cases for non-standard formats?
faq.a6: That's our speciality! Send us the exact dimensions (L × W × H in mm) and we'll prepare a free quote within 24h.
sub.title: Receive your protections every month
sub.desc: For regular collectors, we offer a monthly subscription: a selection of protections suited to your universes, delivered straight to your door. No need to think about ordering.

legal.hero.title: Legal Notice
legal.art1.title: Website Publisher
legal.art1.content:
This website is published by Items Protect, a micro-enterprise registered in France.

  • Name: Items Protect
  • Status: Micro-enterprise (sole proprietorship)
  • Country: France
  • Email: contact@itemsprotect.fr
  • Publication director: The manager of Items Protect
legal.art2.title: Hosting
legal.art2.content:
The website itemsprotect.fr is hosted by a professional hosting provider located within the European Union, ensuring the availability and security of data in compliance with the GDPR.

For any questions regarding hosting or to report unlawful content, you may contact us at contact@itemsprotect.fr.
legal.art3.title: Intellectual Property
legal.art3.content:
All elements constituting the Items Protect website (texts, photographs, visuals, logos, icons, layouts, sounds and all other content) are the exclusive property of Items Protect or its partners and are protected by the provisions of the French Intellectual Property Code.

The Items Protect trademark, as well as the associated logos and distinctive signs, are the property of Items Protect. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, transmission or total or partial exploitation of these elements, regardless of the medium or process used, is strictly prohibited without the prior written authorisation of Items Protect.

Any infringement of these rights may give rise to civil and/or criminal proceedings in accordance with applicable law.
legal.art4.title: Personal Data
legal.art4.content:
Items Protect attaches particular importance to the protection of your personal data and undertakes to comply with applicable regulations, in particular the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

To learn more about how we collect, use and protect your personal data, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
legal.art5.title: Cookies
legal.art5.content:
The Items Protect website may use technical cookies necessary for its proper functioning. These cookies do not collect any personal data for advertising or third-party tracking purposes.

By browsing our website, you accept the use of these technical cookies. You may configure your browser to refuse cookies, which could affect certain features of the website.
legal.art6.title: Liability
legal.art6.content:
Items Protect endeavours to provide information on this website that is as accurate as possible. However, it cannot be held liable for omissions, inaccuracies or deficiencies in updating, whether attributable to Items Protect or to third-party partners providing such information.

All information on the website is provided for informational purposes only and is subject to change. Furthermore, the information contained on the website is not exhaustive. It is provided subject to modifications made since it was published online.
legal.art7.title: Hyperlinks
legal.art7.content:
The Items Protect website may contain links to other websites or resources available on the Internet. Items Protect has no means of controlling websites linked to its own and is not responsible for the availability of such external sites and sources.

Items Protect cannot be held liable for any damage, whether direct or indirect, resulting from access to linked websites or from the use of information published therein.
legal.art8.title: Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
legal.art8.content: These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute relating to the interpretation or performance of these notices, the French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.
legal.art9.title: Contact
legal.art9.content:
For any questions regarding these legal notices, you may contact us:

  • By email: contact@itemsprotect.fr
  • Via the contact form: Contact us

We undertake to respond within 48 working hours.
cgv.hero.title: General Terms and Conditions of Sale
cgv.art1.title: Scope of Application
cgv.art1.content:
These General Terms and Conditions of Sale (hereinafter "T&Cs") apply to all orders placed with Items Protect, a French micro-enterprise specialising in the manufacture and sale of custom acrylic protections for collectors.

Any order implies the unreserved acceptance of these T&Cs. Items Protect reserves the right to amend its T&Cs at any time; the applicable T&Cs are those in force on the date of the order.

These conditions apply exclusively to transactions between Items Protect and individual or professional buyers (B2C and B2B), residing primarily in France and the European Union.
cgv.art2.title: Products and Orders
cgv.art2.content:
Items Protect offers premium acrylic protections intended for the preservation and display of collectible items, in particular:

  • Protections for TCG boosters (Pokémon, Yu-Gi-Oh!, Magic: The Gathering, etc.)
  • Protections for Elite Trainer Boxes and sealed displays
  • Display cases and stands for figurines and Amiibo
  • Custom products made to client specifications

All orders are placed via our contact form or by direct communication. A written confirmation (email) constitutes acceptance of the order by Items Protect. Items Protect reserves the right to refuse any order for legitimate reasons.
cgv.art3.title: Prices and Payment
cgv.art3.content:
Prices are quoted in euros (€), inclusive of all taxes (TTC) for individual buyers. Items Protect, as a micro-enterprise benefiting from the VAT exemption scheme (Article 293 B of the French General Tax Code), is not subject to VAT.

Prices may be modified at any time. The applicable price is the one displayed or communicated at the time of order validation.

Payment is made according to the terms agreed upon at the time of order (bank transfer, PayPal, secure online payment or other agreed method). For custom orders, a deposit of 30% to 50% may be required upon confirmation.
cgv.art4.title: Manufacturing and Delivery Times
cgv.art4.content:
Items Protect manufactures its products by hand in France. The manufacturing times indicated are provided as a guide and may vary depending on workload and order complexity:

  • Standard catalogue products: 5 to 10 working days
  • Custom products: 10 to 21 working days depending on complexity
  • Group or professional orders: delivery time to be agreed based on volume

Delivery is provided by a partner carrier. Shipping costs are borne by the buyer unless otherwise stated. Items Protect shall not be held liable for delays attributable to the carrier.
cgv.art5.title: Right of Withdrawal
cgv.art5.content:
In accordance with Article L.221-18 of the French Consumer Code, the consumer has a period of 14 calendar days from receipt of the product to exercise their right of withdrawal, without having to justify reasons or pay penalties.

Exception: The right of withdrawal does not apply to products made to measure or personalised to the client's specifications (Article L.221-28 of the French Consumer Code).

To exercise this right, the customer must notify their decision by email to contact@itemsprotect.fr before the deadline expires. Return shipping costs are borne by the customer. The refund shall be made within 14 days of receipt of the returned item.
cgv.art6.title: Warranties and Conformity
cgv.art6.content:
All Items Protect products benefit from:

  • Legal warranty of conformity (Articles L.217-4 et seq. of the French Consumer Code): 2 years from delivery of the product
  • Warranty against hidden defects (Articles 1641 et seq. of the French Civil Code)

In the event of a defective or non-conforming product, the customer must contact Items Protect within 30 days of receipt, enclosing photographs of the defect observed. Items Protect shall, as appropriate, replace, repair or refund the product.

These warranties do not cover damage resulting from abnormal use, accident or modification of the product by the customer.
cgv.art7.title: Liability
cgv.art7.content:
Items Protect undertakes to make every effort to provide products of impeccable quality. However, the liability of Items Protect shall not be engaged in the event of:

  • Improper use of the product by the customer
  • Damage to protected collectible items resulting from incorrect installation
  • Force majeure or events beyond the control of Items Protect
  • Delivery delays attributable to the carrier

In any event, the liability of Items Protect is limited to the amount of the order concerned.
cgv.art8.title: Intellectual Property
cgv.art8.content:
Designs, creations and prototypes developed by Items Protect remain the exclusive property of Items Protect, even when produced to the client's specifications, unless otherwise agreed in writing.

Photographs and visuals of products may not be reproduced, exploited or distributed without the prior written authorisation of Items Protect.
cgv.art9.title: Dispute Resolution and Applicable Law
cgv.art9.content:
These T&Cs are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the customer is invited to contact Items Protect in the first instance in order to reach an amicable resolution.

In accordance with Articles L.611-1 et seq. of the French Consumer Code, the customer may have recourse free of charge to a consumer mediator in the event of failure to reach an amicable resolution. The European Online Dispute Resolution platform is accessible at: ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.

Failing amicable resolution, the French courts shall have sole jurisdiction to hear any dispute relating to the interpretation or performance of these T&Cs.
privacy.hero.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.art1.title: Data Controller
privacy.art1.content:
The controller of personal data collected on the website itemsprotect.fr is Items Protect, a French micro-enterprise.

  • Name: Items Protect
  • Contact email: contact@itemsprotect.fr

Items Protect undertakes to process your personal data in strict compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, EU Regulation 2016/679) and the French Data Protection Act of 6 January 1978, as amended.
privacy.art2.title: Data Collected
privacy.art2.content:
In the course of our business, Items Protect may collect the following personal data:

  • Identification data: surname, first name, pseudonym
  • Contact details: email address, postal delivery address, telephone number (if provided)
  • Order data: nature of products ordered, amount, purchase history
  • Payment data: processed directly by our secure payment providers (Items Protect does not retain your bank details)
  • Communication data: messages via the contact form, exchanges by email or instant messaging
  • Technical data: IP address, browsing data (technical cookies only)
  • Social media: Instagram or Discord username if voluntarily provided

We collect only the data strictly necessary for the performance of our services (principle of data minimisation).
privacy.art3.title: Purposes of Processing
privacy.art3.content:
Your personal data is collected and processed for the following purposes:

  • Order management: processing, manufacturing, shipping and tracking of orders
  • Customer service: responding to contact requests, quotation requests and after-sales support
  • Business relationship: sending information relating to your order, invoices and confirmations
  • Improvement of our services: analysis of customer feedback to improve our products and website
  • Legal obligations: retention of accounting and commercial documents in accordance with the law
  • Marketing communication: only with your explicit consent, sending information about our new products
privacy.art4.title: Legal Basis for Processing
privacy.art4.content:
Each data processing operation is based on a legal basis in compliance with the GDPR:

  • Performance of the contract: processing your order, delivery, invoicing (Article 6.1.b GDPR)
  • Legal obligation: retention of accounting documents for 10 years (Article 6.1.c GDPR)
  • Legitimate interest: fraud prevention, improvement of our services (Article 6.1.f GDPR)
  • Consent: marketing communications, use of non-essential cookies (Article 6.1.a GDPR)
privacy.art5.title: Data Retention Period
privacy.art5.content:
Your personal data is retained for the following periods:

  • Customer and order data: 5 years from the last order (commercial limitation period)
  • Accounting data and invoices: 10 years in accordance with legal obligations
  • Contact data (form): 3 years from the last contact
  • Browsing data (cookies): 13 months maximum
  • Marketing data: until withdrawal of consent or 3 years without interaction

Beyond these periods, your data is deleted or irreversibly anonymised.
privacy.art6.title: Data Sharing and Transfer
privacy.art6.content:
Items Protect does not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. Your data may be shared with the following categories of recipients strictly within the framework of performing our services:

  • Transport providers: for the delivery of your orders (name, address, telephone)
  • Payment providers: for the secure processing of transactions
  • Technical providers: website hosting, professional messaging tools

All our providers are subject to contractual obligations of confidentiality and security. Where possible, we favour providers established within the European Union. In the event of transfer outside the EU, appropriate safeguards are implemented (standard contractual clauses of the European Commission).
privacy.art7.title: Your Rights
privacy.art7.content:
In accordance with the GDPR and the French Data Protection Act, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

  • Right of access: obtain a copy of your personal data processed by Items Protect
  • Right of rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data
  • Right to erasure: request the deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten"), subject to legal obligations
  • Right to restriction: temporarily suspend the processing of your data
  • Right to portability: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
  • Right to object: object to the processing of your data for commercial prospecting purposes
  • Right to withdraw consent: withdraw your consent at any time for processing based on consent

To exercise these rights, contact us by email at contact@itemsprotect.fr, enclosing a copy of your identity document. We undertake to respond within one month (this period may be extended by two months for complex requests).

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (French National Commission for Information Technology and Civil Liberties): www.cnil.fr.
privacy.art8.title: Data Security
privacy.art8.content:
Items Protect implements all appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure the security, confidentiality and integrity of your personal data, including:

  • Encryption of communications via the HTTPS protocol (TLS)
  • Restricted access to personal data to authorised personnel only
  • Secure data hosting with certified providers
  • Strong passwords and secure authentication for system access
  • Regular data backups

In the event of a personal data breach likely to pose a risk to your rights and freedoms, Items Protect undertakes to notify the CNIL within 72 hours and to inform you as soon as possible if the risk is high, in accordance with Article 33 of the GDPR.
